workshoptitle: End-to-End Observability on OCI with OCTO APM Demo

tutorials.title: OCTO APM Demo Quickstart Deployment
tutorials.description: Deploy OCTO APM Demo from adibirzu/octo-observability-demo and verify the Drone Shop, Enterprise CRM Portal, Java payment sidecar, ATP, and observability endpoints.

tutorials.title: Enable OCI Operations and Management Services
tutorials.description: Enable and verify OCI APM, RUM, Synthetic Monitoring, Log Analytics OKE Monitoring, Log Analytics Security Monitoring, Monitoring, and database observability.

tutorials.title: Observe the E-Commerce Flow End to End
tutorials.description: Generate Drone Shop and CRM traffic, then validate OCI Application Performance Monitoring tracing and correlated logs.

tutorials.title: Investigate Application, Log, and Database Signals
tutorials.description: Run a correlated RCA across APM traces, Log Analytics application and security monitoring, Monitoring, WAF, Operations Insights, and Database Management.

tutorials.title: Monitor Agent Behavior and Detect Anomalies
tutorials.description: Capture agent behavior changes through OCI APM, Log Analytics, token metrics, tool execution, Langfuse, and anomaly indicators.

tutorials.title: Need Help?
tutorials.description: Template to link to Need Help lab at the end of workshop.
